techniques: 4-Count: Right hand, right foot – step forward, temple strike, knee strike; step back; Left hand, left foot – step forward, temple strike, knee strike; step back
6-Count: Right hand, right foot – step forward, temple strike, knee strike, temple strike; step back; Left hand, left foot – step forward, temple strike, knee strike, temple strike; step back
Tap: Right hand, right foot – step forward, temple strike, tap, knee strike; step back; repeat other side
Tap Twirl: Right hand, right foot – step forward, temple strike, tap, twirl, knee strike; step back; repeat other side
Cob Cob: No footwork – right hand temple strike, left hand temple strike; bend knees – right temple strike, left temple strike; stand up – right knee strike, left knee strike

Cradle: Right hand, right foot – step back temple strike; switch, right to left shoulder; left hand knee strike; switch, left to left shoulder; right hand temple strike; right to right shoulder; step back; repeat other side
Meet and Merge (I go, you go): Right hand, right foot – temple strike, partner #1 push strike, partner #2 blocks; step back; repeat other side switching roles

description: Japanese martial art using a traditional farming tool

techniques: Heaven: Right hand – temple strike and end on left shoulder; Left hand – temple strike and end on left shoulder; Right hand – temple strike and end under left arm; repeat other side
Earth: Right hand – knee strike and end on left shoulder; Left hand – knee strike and end on left shoulder; Right hand – knee strike and end under left arm; repeat other side
Heaven/Earth: Right hand – temple strike and end on left shoulder; Left hand – knee strike and end on left shoulder; Right hand – temple strike and end under left arm; repeat other side
Earth/Heaven: Right hand – knee strike and end on left shoulder; Left hand – temple strike and end on left shoulder; Right hand – knee strike and end under left arm; repeat other side

description: Japanese martial art using a farming tool
Japanese martial art using a long staff
